## 6. Semantic File Map

| Path | Purpose | When To Read |
|---|---|---|
| `PROJECT_BRIEF.md` | Short project orientation | First |
| `MASTER_PROMPT.md` | Full task prompt | Before planning work |
| `REQUIREMENTS.md` | Requirements and non-goals | Before implementation |
| `DECISIONS.md` | Decisions and assumptions | Before changing scope |
| `NEXT_STEPS.md` | Ordered work plan | During execution |
| `CONTEXT_INDEX.md` | Context navigation | Before reading sources |
| `SOURCE_MAP.md` | Source provenance | Before citing or relying on material |
| `_context/` | Converted source material | Search/read as needed |
| `_sources/` | Original files | Use only when conversion is insufficient |
| `_skills/` | Optional specialist rules | Load only when relevant |
| `_versions/` | Snapshots | Use for rollback/reference |
| `_logs/` | Transcripts and processing notes | Use for audit/debugging |

## 7. Source Rules

- Prefer `_context/` over `_sources/`.
- Do not invent facts missing from sources.
- When source coverage is unclear, check `SOURCE_MAP.md`.
- For large files, search relevant sections before reading the whole file.
- Preserve citations, page references, and extraction warnings when present.

## 8. Work Rules

- Follow `NEXT_STEPS.md` in order unless a blocker appears.
- Record scope-affecting decisions in `DECISIONS.md`.
- Keep changes aligned with `MASTER_PROMPT.md` and `REQUIREMENTS.md`.
- Ask the user when a blocker cannot be resolved from workspace files.
- Do not delete source files or logs.

## 9. Quality Rubric

The work is complete only when:

- all requirements are satisfied,
- non-goals are respected,
- source-backed claims are traceable,
- tests or verification steps pass where applicable,
- final changes are summarized clearly,
- unresolved risks are documented.

## 10. Verification Checklist

- [ ] Read the canonical reading order.
- [ ] Checked `SOURCE_MAP.md` for material coverage.
- [ ] Followed `NEXT_STEPS.md`.
- [ ] Preserved constraints and non-goals.
- [ ] Ran required verification.
- [ ] Documented remaining blockers or assumptions.
